source_description: Sanitized HTTP 404 policy/error marker payloads migrated from legacy Reader-Core samples/fixtures/json/{policy_http_404,error_http_404}.json. Captures two distinct 404 failure modes: (1) POLICY_CONTENT_FAILED — upstream policy rejection marker, (2) HTTP_404_CONTENT_FAILED — transport 404 with empty body. Both payloads are marker-only (no real response bodies) and document the expected rule-engine branching behavior for each.
sanitization: Marker-only payloads with no real response bodies. No real API endpoints, no credentials, no user data. Synthetic marker strings (POLICY_CONTENT_FAILED, HTTP_404_CONTENT_FAILED) are test-only constants.

privacy_check.notes: Pure marker payloads; no real data. Migrated from clean synthetic sample.
